channel.title: Almyrida on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Almyrida on Villa de Tara

item.title: Omega Divers
item.description: The Omega Diving Center in Almyrida is a PADI 5* Diving Resort and we have dived with them several times. They dive Elephant Cave which has fossilised elephant teeth and stalactites, the skeleton wreck of the SS Minnewaska where you’ll see lion fish (yes, they have made it to the Mediterranean), and several other sites. Whichever site you are going to dive, the plan is much the same: Assemble at the Dive Center to meet your guides, fill out the medical forms and sort out out your kit.
